alkylation reagent: incubated in 55 mM iodoacetamide in 50 mM ammonium bicarbonate
alkylation concentration: incubated in 55 mM iodoacetamide in 50 mM ammonium bicarbonate
cleavage agent: incubated in 10 ng/μl sequencing grade trypsin in 50 mM ammonium bicarbonate overnight at 37°C
fragmentation method: we performed two types of bimolecular fluorescence complementation (BiFC) assays: Split-YFP and Split-Luc.
instrument: After a 20 μl reaction mixture was subjected to tandem MS with an Orbitrap Elite mass spectrometer equipped with ETD
ionization type: The mass spectrometer was operated in data-dependent mode with a full MS scan (375–1,600 M/z) in FT mode at a resolution of 120,000 followed by ETD (Electron Transfer Dissociation) MS/MS scans on the 10 most abundant ions in the initial MS scan.
reduction reagent: incubated in 10 mM DTT in 50 mM ammonium bicarbonate
reduction concentration: incubated in 10 mM DTT in 50 mM ammonium bicarbonate
